introSection:
Motorbike Launch Coaster (Chinese: 摩托过山车) was a steel motorbike launched roller coaster previously located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China. Opened in 2006, it was the second 600m Motorbike Coaster installation from Vekoma.

The ride closed in 2023.
fullText:
Motorbike Launch Coaster (Chinese: 摩托过山车) was a steel motorbike launched roller coaster previously located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China. Opened in 2006, it was the second 600m Motorbike Coaster installation from Vekoma.

The ride closed in 2023.

Yellow track with turquoise-blue supports.
